field_values.action_summary: The group reunites and discusses their individual encounters. Realizing they have no other way to get what they want, they agree to face the Witch and prepare for their journey to the land of the Winkies the next morning.
field_values.camera_intent: Group medium shots; Character close-ups (commitment beats); Final wide shot (travel preparation)
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Visible character fatigue and emotional residue from individual trials
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH011_SC007

## Production Intent
The group reunites within the palace guest quarters to process individual trials and consolidate their resolve. The scene must transition from a state of weary uncertainty to a unified, somber commitment to face the Witch and depart for the land of the Winkies.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto

## Required Environments
- palace_guest_quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Character fatigue/emotional state following individual trials
- Dorothy's visual identity: white dress/clothing

## Beat List
- BT001: Group reunites and discusses individual encounters.
- BT002: Realization of no other way; agreement to face the Witch.
- BT003: Preparation for journey to the land of the Winkies the next morning.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
